name: cosmogonic-quantum-mechalogodrom
description: Tsotchke-powered deterministic A-Life petri cosmos with WebGL2 rendering, 113-system comparative reports, an exact 22-external-repository corpus ledger (8 deep, 7 wired, 2 harvest, 4 fenced, 1 meta; 17/21 non-meta integrated), bounded Eshkol-inspired Taylor forecasting, a deterministic classical state-vector adaptation, 26 BiologicForms, 25 Archons, 100 faculties, 25 ToM organs, 10 emergence angles, and proxy-only consciousness/sentience labs. Not an LLM, CSPRNG, physical-quantum, consciousness, or sentience claim.
author: 0thernes Corp <0_0@0thernes.art> (https://0thernes.art)

scripts.predev: bun scripts/sync-guard.ts && bun run gen:alife && bun scripts/gen-bible-corpus.ts && bun scripts/build.ts
scripts.build: bun run gen:alife && bun scripts/gen-bible-corpus.ts && bun scripts/gen-consciousness-lab-data.ts && bun scripts/build.ts
scripts.lint: oxlint src server.ts tests bench scripts
scripts.check:static: bun run format:check && bun run typecheck && bun run lint
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run verify:receipts && bun run sync:check && bun run verify:facts && bun run filemap:check && bun run build && bun run generated:check
scripts.gen:alife: bun scripts/alife-comparison-stats.ts && bun scripts/alife-comparison-geometry.ts && bun scripts/alife-codeground-sensitivity.ts && bun scripts/gen-alife-embed.ts
